last_cycle.summary: Q107 done: isolate_gc_proxy.py. argmin(Isolate) ≈ argmax(gc) with hit@±1=65-79%, MAE<1.2 layers at low noise. ~84% patching savings if used as pre-screen. Moderate proxy strength.
